title: Participate in the ongoing development and implementation of a HACCP based QA system
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Participate in the ongoing development and implementation of a HACCP based QA system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Involve management and staff in developing the quality system

pcs.text: Involve relevant staff members and managers in clarifying purpose and scope of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Involve relevant staff members and managers in clarifying purpose and scope of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Involve relevant staff members and managers in clarifying purpose and scope of program.

pcs.text: Clearly define workplace needs and expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clearly define workplace needs and expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clearly define workplace needs and expectations.

pcs.text: Incorporate other systems, including AUS-MEAT, workplace health and safety and meat inspection according to workplace needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate other systems, including AUS-MEAT, workplace health and safety and meat inspection according to workplace needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate other systems, including AUS-MEAT, workplace health and safety and meat inspection according to workplace needs.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Involve management and staff in developing the quality system

elements.title: Establish the scope of the system

pcs.text: Define the scope of the HACCP-based QA system to encompass food safety, quality, regulatory compliance, animal welfare and preventative maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the scope of the HACCP-based QA system to encompass food safety, quality, regulatory compliance, animal welfare and preventative maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the scope of the HACCP-based QA system to encompass food safety, quality, regulatory compliance, animal welfare and preventative maintenance.

pcs.text: Set up the system to prevent and control food safety hazards and other hazards, including product quality and workplace health and safety hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up the system to prevent and control food safety hazards and other hazards, including product quality and workplace health and safety hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up the system to prevent and control food safety hazards and other hazards, including product quality and workplace health and safety hazards.

pcs.text: Seek consensus from relevant workplace areas on coverage and scope of system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek consensus from relevant workplace areas on coverage and scope of system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek consensus from relevant workplace areas on coverage and scope of system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Establish the scope of the system

elements.title: Conduct hazard analysis and assessment

pcs.text: Assess every step in the production process for potential food safety hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess every step in the production process for potential food safety hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess every step in the production process for potential food safety hazards.

pcs.text: Establish critical control points (CCPs) to identify methods for preventing and controlling significant hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish critical control points (CCPs) to identify methods for preventing and controlling significant hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish critical control points (CCPs) to identify methods for preventing and controlling significant hazards.

pcs.text: Establish critical limits for each CCP
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish critical limits for each CCP?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish critical limits for each CCP.

pcs.text: Assign measurable or recognisable standards for each CCP to define the critical limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign measurable or recognisable standards for each CCP to define the critical limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign measurable or recognisable standards for each CCP to define the critical limits.

pcs.text: Technically and scientifically validate critical limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Technically and scientifically validate critical limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Technically and scientifically validate critical limits.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct hazard analysis and assessment

elements.title: Ensure all documents, work procedures and processes required for the system are developed, available and in use

pcs.text: Describe all products and processes covered by the HACCP-based QA system in a standardised format defining product characteristics relevant to food safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe all products and processes covered by the HACCP-based QA system in a standardised format defining product characteristics relevant to food safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe all products and processes covered by the HACCP-based QA system in a standardised format defining product characteristics relevant to food safety.

pcs.text: Review work instructions and standard operating procedures (SOPs) for accuracy, relevancy and sufficiency to prevent potential hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review work instructions and standard operating procedures (SOPs) for accuracy, relevancy and sufficiency to prevent potential hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review work instructions and standard operating procedures (SOPs) for accuracy, relevancy and sufficiency to prevent potential hazards.

pcs.text: Implement documented procedures for monitoring CCPs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement documented procedures for monitoring CCPs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement documented procedures for monitoring CCPs.

pcs.text: Implement documented procedures designed to ensure any CCPs that are out of control are brought back under control, and any affected products are suitably handled
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement documented procedures designed to ensure any CCPs that are out of control are brought back under control, and any affected products are suitably handled?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement documented procedures designed to ensure any CCPs that are out of control are brought back under control, and any affected products are suitably handled.

pcs.text: Implement documented procedures to ensure the whole HACCP-based QA system is regularly audited and verified as working effectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement documented procedures to ensure the whole HACCP-based QA system is regularly audited and verified as working effectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement documented procedures to ensure the whole HACCP-based QA system is regularly audited and verified as working effectively.

pcs.text: Ensure availability, currency and current usage of all documents and records required for system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure availability, currency and current usage of all documents and records required for system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure availability, currency and current usage of all documents and records required for system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Ensure all documents, work procedures and processes required for the system are developed, available and in use

elements.title: Audit, verify and validate the system

pcs.text: Routinely revise, verify and validate HACCP plan through reassessing hazards, CCPs, critical limits, testing methods, and all related HACCP system procedures, to ensure their ongoing relevancy to plant operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Routinely revise, verify and validate HACCP plan through reassessing hazards, CCPs, critical limits, testing methods, and all related HACCP system procedures, to ensure their ongoing relevancy to plant operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Routinely revise, verify and validate HACCP plan through reassessing hazards, CCPs, critical limits, testing methods, and all related HACCP system procedures, to ensure their ongoing relevancy to plant operations.

pcs.text: Take corrective action and record follow-up on audit findings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take corrective action and record follow-up on audit findings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action and record follow-up on audit findings.

pcs.text: Review HACCP-based QA system to account for any process or product changes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review HACCP-based QA system to account for any process or product changes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review HACCP-based QA system to account for any process or product changes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Audit, verify and validate the system
